message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #EAEAEA
  BorderColor #000000
}

skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #EAEAEA
  BorderColor #000000
}

actor "门店人员" as StoreStaff
rectangle "钉钉门店宝" as DingDingStoreApp
rectangle "报货中心" as ReportingCenter

StoreStaff -> DingDingStoreApp : 申报货物
DingDingStoreApp -> ReportingCenter : 下发申报货物单据
ReportingCenter -> ReportingCenter : 单据数据校验
ReportingCenter -> ReportingCenter : 单据储存
ReportingCenter ..> DingDingStoreApp : 
DingDingStoreApp ..> StoreStaff : 

@enduml
```
